reviews.review_title: All items work can not draw lines
reviews.review_description: Lines will not show up. They draw but will not show up to place objects on them. can see line being drawn but no lines show. They will show up if you move your hand into them but not in play location (your room). DOES NOT WORK AS VIDEO SHOWS. TRIED RELOAD OF GAME NO LINES STILL. GAME PLAY SEEMS OFF NO CONTROL. QUESTION TO STAFF--How does one use this line draw in this game? I wish to use this if it works or update. GAME SAYS INSTALLED AFTER DONE WILL NO LONGER WORK--POOR SERVICE!!! (TODAY---2-19-25)!!!
